items.creator: Helena Woods
items.title: The New Wave Astrology movement was created from noticing a gap in my industry
items.summary:
The New Wave Astrology movement was created from noticing a gap in my industry. ⚡️

The people that are drawn to my work and content genuinely care about other people. 

And it’s not fake. 

We love doing 1:1 readings. 
We love befriending fellow astrologers. 
We love collaboration  competition. 

We know that when we all succeed when one person does well. 

We are bonded by the craft and the love for caring about our fellow humans. 

We know there is abundance for all of us together. 

Over the past several years I’ve had a lot of success. 

And with that, I’ve received a lot of hate. 

Some of it public. 

Some of it my students tell me about the messages they received privately. 

I’ve been heartbroken by my industry and the people I once wanted to befriend. Last year was a year of healing. 

And I’ve abeen healed immensely by the incredibly kind astrologers I’ve befriended (thank you 2026) 

One thing you’ll always see me doing is actually celebrating community. 

Always lifting other astrologers up, collaborating showcasing them and their gifts. Wanting my peers to succeed. 

Always. 

Friendship, relationships, community = it’s literally why I became a professional astrologer. I wanted to find like-minded people. 

And with Jupiter entering Leo, I’m starting a new era. 

The New Wave Astrology movement. 🌊 

Conferences. 
Retreats. 
Astrology weekends. 
Student Community Meetups. 

Taking this offline and in-person. 

I’m scoping out locations now. 

Comment TOGETHER to get all the details when it’s announced later this year ⚡️✨🌊 I don’t want you to miss the first event 🎉

#newwaveastrology #newwaveastrologer

items.creator: 占星播客
items.title: July Astrology Forecast 2026
items.summary:
A deep dive into the astrology forecast for July 2026, with astrologers Chris Brennan and Austin Coppock. 

The month opens on highly unstable ground, dominated by a volatile Mars-Uranus conjunction that threatens sudden, unpredictable shifts and explosive turns. This erratic energy is ruled by a newly stationary retrograde Mercury, which has just backed away from a conjunction with Jupiter. This combination sets the stage for logistical snafus, technological difficulties, and widespread delays right out of the gate.

Jupiter, having just entered Leo at the end of June, begins to form a tense opposition with Pluto that goes exact around the middle of the month. This highlights major power struggles and the tension between truth and control. This opposition is part of a much larger, momentous pattern of simultaneous outer planet alignments peaking this month. As Uranus completes its first exact trine with Pluto, these planets lock into a complex basket configuration alongside Jupiter and Neptune. This heavy planetary geometry indicates that significant precursor events are unfolding in the background, particularly surrounding rapid technological or military innovations.

We finally see a more positive shift in the astrological weather during the second half of the month. Mars applies to a stabilizing, constructive sextile with Saturn, helping to ground the earlier chaos. Mercury stations direct, clearing up miscommunications, and the Sun makes its triumphant ingress into Leo to form an auspicious conjunction with Jupiter. This cazimi brings a much needed wave of radiant, showy warmth and outward confidence, despite an opposition with Pluto. However, a lingering Venus-Mars square operating in the background introduces an unwelcome element of creative friction and tension in partnerships, pitting the forces of unification against the drive to sever and divide.

This late July window ultimately serves as a temporary lull, and a calm before the storm. By early August, we swiftly transition into eclipse season, bringing weighty major endings and beginnings to the forefront, just as Venus enters the shadow sign of its upcoming retrograde phase.

This is episode 541 of The Astrology Podcast. 

United Astrology Conference

https://uacastrology.com

Austin's Website

https://austincoppock.com
